hypothesis: E-49: Center+Extent decomposition (Direction C). Replaces 1-ch binary dense_fg mask with 5-ch structural targets: center Gaussian heatmap (BCE loss) + per-pixel distance to l/r/t/b edges (SmoothL1, masked to bbox interior). Core hypothesis: decomposing 'foreground' into 'where is center?' and 'how far to edges?' provides richer spatial supervision than a binary mask, helping the backbone learn structured object representations. All targets are bbox-derived (no real PNG masks used). If pf_mIoU > E-45 (0.8282) OR significant improvement in size-stratified IoU, center+extent is validated as the next Teacher route direction.
head: dense_ce_aux
